title: lasiogyne phlomoides
intro: Lasiogyne phlomoides, also known as the Madagascar mint, is a plant species native to Madagascar, belonging to the family Lamiaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its essential oils, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of lasiogyne phlomoides include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve nausea, and exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or essential oils for medicinal use.
